name: Emberhollow Forge Town
identity: A forge-centered town built on older burn layers where prestige comes from making durable goods from former ruin.
approach: Cooled black stone terraces, open furnace yards, and rebuilt retaining walls frame the settlement.
inside: Smithing yards, labor barracks, family compounds, and dedication braziers create a blunt but proud civic rhythm.
who_is_out_of_place: lazy buyers seeking prestige without labor
faith: forge-linked ceremonies are public custom rather than temple hierarchy
seasonal_change: Cooling periods allow major maintenance and transit.

sensory_surface.detail: Cooled black stone terraces, open furnace yards, and rebuilt retaining walls frame the settlement.
Smithing yards, labor barracks, family compounds, and dedication braziers create a blunt but proud civic rhythm.

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually smiths, ore haulers, family labor crews, and public conduct is read through expectations such as honor forge schedules, maintain shared heatworks.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by Forge Dedication Halls, Frontier Hammer Companies.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as furnace failure, labor disputes, ash burial begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Emberhollow Forge Town stands apart because its economy leans on weapons, industrial tools; public faith remains visible through forge-linked ceremonies are public custom rather than temple hierarchy; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble those disrespecting forge lineage, lazy buyers seeking prestige without labor.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Emberhollow Forge Town begin through forge town rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
